name: conditional-paragraph-alignment
description: Table style with firstRow conditional (jc=center in pPr) and lastRow conditional (jc=right in pPr).
expected_behavior: First row paragraphs: center alignment from conditional pPr. Last row paragraphs: right alignment from conditional pPr. Middle rows: no alignment (default/left).
current_status: GAP-020 — conditional pPr not propagated to paragraphs
